plugin: Independent source and legacy extensions under products/plugin.
Owns only filesystem MCP 3006 and plugin gateway 3017.
Own config/data directories and plugin-only tests/build.
roundtable: Standalone app and launchers under products/roundtable.
Default CDP/Playwright runtime owns 3020, 9223, and 8931 only.
In-process filesystem transactions use local-core and workspace .web-agents data.
local_core: Shared path identity, locks, atomic files, permissions, transactions, registry, and filesystem tools.
No UI, HTTP server, Chrome API, DOM, product path, fixed product port, or product state.
repository: Static cross-product boundary checker and bidirectional lifecycle tests.
Independent package scripts, READMEs, local config ownership, and ignored runtime data.
